cards.front: What is the primary purpose of matching information to classes of users in a data warehouse?
cards.back: To ensure that the data is relevant and useful to the specific group of users it is being provided to

cards.front: What is a class of users?
cards.back: A group of people who have similar needs and requirements when it comes to accessing information from a data warehouse

cards.front: Why is data quality critical in matching information to classes of users?
cards.back: Because inaccurate or outdated data can lead to poor decision-making and decreased user satisfaction
A centralized repository of data that is used to support business intelligence and decision-making

cards.front: What are the benefits of matching information to classes of users?
cards.back: Improved data relevance, increased user satisfaction, and better decision-making
